CREATE TABLE ontime (FlightDate Date, FlightID UInt32, Origin String, Destination String);
SELECT count() FROM ontime WHERE indexHint(FlightDate = '2017-09-15');
SELECT FlightDate AS k, count() FROM ontime WHERE indexHint(FlightDate = '2017-09-15') GROUP BY k ORDER BY k ASC;
SELECT FlightDate, count(*) FROM ontime WHERE indexHint(FlightDate IN ('2017-09-15', '2017-09-16')) GROUP BY FlightDate;
SELECT a.FlightDate, b.Origin FROM ontime a JOIN ontime b ON a.FlightID = b.FlightID WHERE indexHint(a.FlightDate = '2017-09-15') AND indexHint(b.Origin = 'JFK');
SELECT FlightDate AS k, count() FROM ontime WHERE indexHint(Origin = 'JFK') GROUP BY k HAVING count() > 1;
SELECT FlightDate AS k, count(), (SELECT count() FROM ontime WHERE Origin = 'JFK') AS total_flights FROM ontime WHERE indexHint(Destination = 'LAX') GROUP BY k ORDER BY k;
WITH (SELECT count() FROM ontime WHERE Origin = 'JFK') AS total FROM ontime WHERE indexHint(FlightDate = '2017-09-15') ORDER BY total;
SELECT k, count() FROM (SELECT FlightDate AS k FROM ontime WHERE indexHint(FlightID > 0) GROUP BY k) GROUP BY k ORDER BY count() DESC;
